title: Help shape the topics for ELDK27!
subtitle: Experts Live Denmark 2027 · 9–10 February 2027
intro: Three quick questions — about 2 minutes of your time. Pick the technical track that excites you most, select your top three topics, and tell us your level of knowledge.
introDisclaimer: The topics listed are samples to gauge interest — not a final session or topic list. Speakers can use these insights when submitting sessions during the Call for Speakers, and the organizer team will use them when selecting sessions for ELDK27.
introThankYou: Thank you for helping us — you're a true community champion!
thanksTitle: Thanks — your input helps shape ELDK27.
thanksBody: Anonymous, aggregated results are public — see the dashboard link below. Speakers interested in submitting to ELDK27 will also get the link, so they can shape their abstracts around what attendees want.
